name: remediation
description: CLI tool that scans React source code and detects design system inconsistencies

scripts.changeset:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm run build && npm publish
scripts.changeset:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && npm run build && npm publish
scripts.changeset:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version && npm run build && npm publish
